name: reinforcement-world-model
paperTitle: Reinforcement World Model Learning for LLM-based Agents
content:
## Introduction

Agent learns to predict state transitions, then uses predictions for planning without explicit simulation. This approach enables practical implementation of advanced techniques without extensive theoretical background.

## Core Concept

Agent learns to predict state transitions, then uses predictions for planning without explicit simulation.

```
  │

  │
  └─→ Output
```
